
:::{.callout-tip}
This section is adapted from @dobson4e [§6.2-6.3] and 
@dunn2018generalized [Chapter 3](https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-1-4419-0118-7_3).
:::

### Assumptions in linear regression models {.smaller .scrollable}

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec-linreg-assumptions.qmd >}}

### Direct visualization

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diag_direct_viz.qmd >}}

### Residuals {#sec-lm-residuals}

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diag_residuals.qmd >}}

### Marginal distributions of residuals

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diag_marginal_resid.qmd >}}

### QQ plot of standardized residuals

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diag_qqplot.qmd >}}

### Formal diagnostic tests for linear regression assumptions

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diag_formal_tests.qmd >}}

### Conditional distributions of residuals

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diag_conditional_resid.qmd >}}

### Cook's distance {#sec-cooks-distance}

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diag_cooks_distance.qmd >}}


### Diagnostics constructed by hand

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diag_by_hand.qmd >}}

### Diagnostics for the independence assumption

{{< include _subfiles/Linear-models-overview/_sec_linreg_diag_independence.qmd >}}
